subject: Tiếng Anh 12
name: Part 7: Writing
description: Viết về kế hoạch nghề nghiệp

sections.heading: 1. Cấu trúc bài viết về kế hoạch nghề nghiệp
sections.content:
Essay Structure:

Introduction (Mở bài):
  • State your career goal
  • Explain why you chose this career
  • Mention what you look forward to
Body Paragraph 1 - Current Situation (Thân bài 1):
  • Describe your current skills and qualifications
  • Mention what you need to catch up with
  • Discuss areas where you need to keep up with changes
Body Paragraph 2 - Action Plan (Thân bài 2):
  • Explain steps you've come up with
  • Mention how you'll get on with professionals
  • Discuss challenges you might put up with
Body Paragraph 3 - Long-term Goals (Thân bài 3):
  • Describe who you look up to
  • Explain how you'll face up to challenges
  • Mention how you'll live up to expectations
Conclusion (Kết bài):
  • Summarize your career plan
  • Express confidence in achieving goals
  • Mention commitment to continuous growth

sections.heading: 2. Useful Phrases for Career Plan Writing
sections.content:
Introduction Phrases:

  • I look forward to pursuing a career in...
  • My goal is to become...
  • I have always been interested in...
  • I aspire to work as...

Describing Current Situation:

  • Currently, I am developing skills in...
  • I need to catch up with...
  • I must keep up with...
  • I have experience in...

Discussing Plans:

  • I have come up with a plan to...
  • I plan to get on with professionals by...
  • I will face up to challenges by...
  • I aim to live up to...

Mentioning Challenges:

  • I may have to put up with...
  • I won't run out of motivation because...
  • I will make up for any gaps by...

Conclusion Phrases:

  • In conclusion, I am committed to...
  • I am confident that...
  • With dedication and hard work, I will...
  • I look forward to achieving...

sections.heading: 3. Sample Essay
sections.content:
My Career Plan: Becoming a Software Engineer

Introduction:

I look forward to pursuing a career in software engineering. I have always been fascinated by technology and how it can solve real-world problems. My goal is to become a skilled software engineer who can come up with innovative solutions for complex challenges. I chose this career because it combines creativity with technical skills, and offers opportunities for continuous learning and growth.

Current Situation:

Currently, I am studying computer science and developing my programming skills. I have experience in several programming languages including Python and JavaScript. However, I need to catch up with the latest frameworks and technologies that are constantly emerging in the field. I must keep up with industry trends by reading technical blogs, attending webinars, and practicing coding regularly. I also need to improve my problem-solving skills and learn more about software architecture and design patterns.

Action Plan:

I have come up with a detailed plan to achieve my career goals. First, I will complete relevant online courses and obtain industry certifications. Second, I plan to get on with professionals in the tech industry by attending networking events and joining online communities. I will also seek internship opportunities to gain practical experience. I understand that I may have to put up with initial rejections and challenges, but I won't run out of motivation. If I make mistakes, I will make up for them by learning from the experience and improving my skills.

Long-term Goals:

I look up to successful software engineers who have made significant contributions to technology. I want to face up to complex technical challenges and develop solutions that make a difference. My performance will live up to professional standards through continuous learning and dedication. In five years, I aim to be working on innovative projects at a leading tech company. In ten years, I hope to be in a senior position where I can mentor junior engineers and contribute to important technological advancements.

Conclusion:

In conclusion, I am committed to building a successful career in software engineering. I am confident that with hard work, continuous learning, and the right strategies, I will achieve my goals. I look forward to the challenges and opportunities that lie ahead, and I am prepared to keep up with the rapid changes in technology. My career plan provides a clear roadmap, but I remain flexible and open to new opportunities that may arise along the way.

sections.heading: 4. Writing Tips
sections.content:
Tips for Writing a Strong Career Plan Essay:

  1. Be specific: Don't just say 'I want to be successful.' Explain exactly what career you want and why.
  2. Use three-word phrasal verbs: Incorporate phrasal verbs like 'look forward to,' 'come up with,' 'get on with' naturally.
  3. Show self-awareness: Acknowledge your strengths and weaknesses honestly.
  4. Be realistic: Set achievable goals with clear timelines.
  5. Show commitment: Demonstrate that you're willing to work hard and face challenges.
  6. Proofread: Check for grammar, spelling, and punctuation errors.
  7. Use transitions: Connect ideas smoothly with words like 'however,' 'moreover,' 'in addition.'
  8. Be authentic: Write about your genuine interests and goals, not what you think others want to hear.

exercises.question: What should you include in the introduction of a career plan essay?
options: Your career goal and why you chose it
exercises.explanation: Mở bài nên có mục tiêu nghề nghiệp và lý do chọn nghề đó.

exercises.question: Which phrase is appropriate for introducing your career goal?
options: I look forward to pursuing a career in...
I don't know what I want
exercises.explanation: 'I look forward to pursuing a career in...' phù hợp để giới thiệu mục tiêu.

exercises.question: What should Body Paragraph 1 focus on?
exercises.explanation: Thân bài 1 nên tập trung vào kỹ năng và trình độ hiện tại.

exercises.question: Which phrasal verb means 'to create a plan'?
exercises.explanation: 'Come up with' nghĩa là nghĩ ra, tạo ra kế hoạch.

exercises.question: What should you mention in Body Paragraph 2?
exercises.explanation: Thân bài 2 nên đề cập kế hoạch hành động và các bước.

exercises.question: Which phrase shows you're willing to tolerate difficulties?
options: I may have to put up with...
exercises.explanation: 'I may have to put up with...' cho thấy sẵn sàng chịu đựng khó khăn.

exercises.question: What should Body Paragraph 3 discuss?
exercises.explanation: Thân bài 3 nên thảo luận về mục tiêu dài hạn và hình mẫu.

exercises.question: Which phrase means 'to admire someone'?
exercises.explanation: 'Look up to' nghĩa là ngưỡng mộ ai đó.

exercises.question: What should you do in the conclusion?
exercises.explanation: Kết bài nên tóm tắt và thể hiện sự tự tin.

exercises.question: According to the sample essay, what career does the writer want?
exercises.explanation: Người viết muốn trở thành Software Engineer - kỹ sư phần mềm.

exercises.question_text: Mark True or False about career plan essay structure:
options: Introduction should state your career goal.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Mở bài nêu mục tiêu. b) False - Thân bài cần thiết. c) True - Đề cập kỹ năng hiện tại. d) False - Kết bài không giới thiệu chủ đề mới.

exercises.question_text: Decide True or False about writing tips:
options: Be specific about your career goals.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Cụ thể về mục tiêu. b) False - Phải kiểm tra lỗi. c) True - Dùng cụm động từ tự nhiên. d) False - Không sao chép.

exercises.question_text: Based on the sample essay, mark True or False:
options: The writer looks forward to software engineering.
The writer will give up if facing challenges.
The writer looks up to successful engineers.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Mong chờ nghề kỹ sư phần mềm. b) False - Có kế hoạch chi tiết. c) False - Không bỏ cuộc. d) True - Ngưỡng mộ kỹ sư thành công.

exercises.question_text: Complete: I _____ _____ to pursuing a career. (three words)
exercises.explanation: 'Look forward to' - mong chờ.

exercises.question_text: Complete: I have _____ _____ _____ a plan. (four words)
exercises.explanation: 'Come up with' - nghĩ ra.

exercises.question_text: How many main body paragraphs should a career plan essay have? (write number)
exercises.explanation: Nên có 3 đoạn thân bài chính.

exercises.question: Which is NOT a good writing tip?
exercises.explanation: Sao chép bài của người khác không phải là lời khuyên tốt.

exercises.question: What does 'face up to challenges' mean in career writing?
exercises.explanation: 'Face up to challenges' nghĩa là đối mặt và giải quyết thách thức.

exercises.question: According to the sample essay, what will the writer do if they make mistakes?
options: Make up for them by learning
exercises.explanation: Người viết sẽ 'make up for them by learning' - bù đắp bằng cách học hỏi.

exercises.question: What should your performance do according to career writing?
exercises.explanation: Hiệu suất nên 'live up to professional standards' - đáp ứng tiêu chuẩn chuyên nghiệp.
